name: Kiwanis Park
description: Come play pickleball at Kiwanis Park in Okeechobee, FL! There are 2 outdoor concrete courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The facility includes amenities like lights and restrooms. The courts are free.

name: KOA Kampgrounds of America
description: KOA Kampgrounds of America is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Okeechobee, FL. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. The courts are private.
fees: Private — Reservation at campground is required

name: OK Corral Cabins Club
description: Come play pickleball at OK Corral Cabins Club in Okeechobee, FL! There are 4 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. A one-time fee is required to play. Amenities include food, restrooms, and water.
fees: Fee required — $10 per player. Bring your own paddle and balls or rent ours for an additional $10/person

name: Okeechobee sports complex
description: Pickleball lines are painted on tennis courts

name: Silver Palms RV Village
description: Silver Palms RV Village is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Okeechobee, FL. There are 10 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include lights. Reservations are available. The courts are private.
fees: Private — Must be staying at the resort to play
